3080820.name: Re:END
3080820.description:
Re:END is a laid-back, top-down, solo mode RPG, like the great MMOs of the good old days. Re:END is easy to operate, and has a deep system, including leveling up, reincarnation, pets, equipment upgrades, arenas, materials, and more.

Experience an RPG with all the elements that made the good old days (late 2000s) MMORPGs.

▼Leveling up and reincarnation

What would an MMO be without leveling up? Nothing beats the feeling of overcoming adversity, discovering new and better ways to earn experience points, and getting stronger with every level.

Allocate status points every time you level up, recalibrate, and reincarnate. Get stronger and develop your character to be who you are.

▼Collecting materials and upgrading weapons

Collect materials by defeating powerful monsters or fishing to improve your equipment. Fight more powerful monsters, face new challenges, and prepare for the next power spike.

▼Pets

All enemies, including bosses, can become your allies (some arena monsters cannot join). When you defeat an enemy, there is a small 0.3% chance that it will become your ally. The probability may be low, but the sense of accomplishment when it happens is exceptional!
